ensures.text: forall c1: int, r1: int, c2: int, r2: int {:trigger WindowArea(c1, r1, c2, r2)} {:trigger WindowAvoidsDead(c1, r1, c2, r2, x, y)} {:trigger IsValidWindow(a, b, c1, r1, c2, r2)} :: 0 <= c1 < a && 0 <= r1 < b && 0 <= c2 < a && 0 <= r2 < b && IsValidWindow(a, b, c1, r1, c2, r2) && WindowAvoidsDead(c1, r1, c2, r2, x, y) ==> WindowArea(c1, r1, c2, r2) <= area

area == 0 || exists c1: int, r1: int, c2: int, r2: int {:trigger WindowArea(c1, r1, c2, r2)} {:trigger WindowAvoidsDead(c1, r1, c2, r2, x, y)} {:trigger IsValidWindow(a, b, c1, r1, c2, r2)} | 0 <= c1 < a && 0 <= r1 < b && 0 <= c2 < a && 0 <= r2 < b :: IsValidWindow(a, b, c1, r1, c2, r2) && WindowAvoidsDead(c1, r1, c2, r2, x, y) && WindowArea(c1, r1, c2, r2) == area

forall c1: int, r1: int, c2: int, r2: int {:trigger WindowArea(c1, r1, c2, r2)} {:trigger WindowAvoidsDead(c1, r1, c2, r2, x, y)} {:trigger IsValidWindow(a, b, c1, r1, c2, r2)} :: 0 <= c1 < a && 0 <= r1 < b && 0 <= c2 < a && 0 <= r2 < b && IsValidWindow(a, b, c1, r1, c2, r2) && WindowAvoidsDead(c1, r1, c2, r2, x, y) ==> WindowArea(c1, r1, c2, r2) <= area

area == 0 || exists c1: int, r1: int, c2: int, r2: int {:trigger WindowArea(c1, r1, c2, r2)} {:trigger WindowAvoidsDead(c1, r1, c2, r2, x, y)} {:trigger IsValidWindow(a, b, c1, r1, c2, r2)} | 0 <= c1 < a && 0 <= r1 < b && 0 <= c2 < a && 0 <= r2 < b :: IsValidWindow(a, b, c1, r1, c2, r2) && WindowAvoidsDead(c1, r1, c2, r2, x, y) && WindowArea(c1, r1, c2, r2) == area

foralls.range: 0 <= c1 < a && 0 <= r1 < b && 0 <= c2 < a && 0 <= r2 < b && IsValidWindow(a, b, c1, r1, c2, r2) && WindowAvoidsDead(c1, r1, c2, r2, x, y)
